title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Ceva Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Ceva Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Ceva Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ceva Logistics India:
Ceva Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ceva Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
